    Represents a ping message that is sent to check the connectivity of the network.

    Pirates - Class in Model.Board.AdventureCards
    Represents the pirate card in the game.
    Pirates(int, CardLevel, int, List<CannonShot>, int, int) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.Pirates
     
    Pirates(JsonObject) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.Pirates
     
    PiratesBatteryRemovalState - Class in Controller.Pirates
    Represents the state where a player removes batteries to power up weapons during the pirates encounter phase.
    PiratesBatteryRemovalState(Context, double, int) - Constructor for class Controller.Pirates.PiratesBatteryRemovalState
    Constructs a new PiratesBatteryRemovalState.
    PiratesCannonShotsState - Class in Controller.Pirates
    Represents the state where cannon shots from pirates are resolved.
    PiratesCannonShotsState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.Pirates.PiratesCannonShotsState
    Constructs a new PiratesCannonShotsState.
    PiratesCheckShipState - Class in Controller.Pirates
    Represents the state in which a player checks their ship's integrity after being hit by cannon shots during the pirates phase of the game.
    PiratesCheckShipState(Context, int, int) - Constructor for class Controller.Pirates.PiratesCheckShipState
     
    PiratesManageShotState - Class in Controller.Pirates
    Manages the resolution of a cannon shot fired by pirates at a special player during the flight phase.
    PiratesManageShotState(Context, int, int) - Constructor for class Controller.Pirates.PiratesManageShotState
    Constructs a PiratesManageShotState with the specified context, number, and turn.
    PiratesPowerDeclarationState - Class in Controller.Pirates
    Represents the state where a player declares how much cannon power (converted from batteries) they want to use to face the pirates.
    PiratesPowerDeclarationState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.Pirates.PiratesPowerDeclarationState
    Constructs a PiratesPowerDeclarationState with the specified context.
    PiratesRewardState - Class in Controller.Pirates
    Handles the reward phase after the pirate attack.
    PiratesRewardState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.Pirates.PiratesRewardState
    Constructs a new PiratesRewardState.
    PlaceAlienState - Class in Controller.RealTimeBuilding
    State that manages the placement of aliens in cabins.

    Constructor that determines which players can insert aliens.
